About

Multidisciplinary product & brand designer with a business brain — drawn to the complex problems worth solving.

I'm a multidisciplinary designer with 11+ years across health-tech, fintech, B2B SaaS and marketplaces — working end to end, from research and strategy through UX, UI and brand. I've led cross-functional teams, embedded design into commercial decisions, and shipped products from 0→1.

Brand is the part of the craft I love most — naming, identity, voice and the small details that make a product feel human — and I fold it into product work wherever I can.

Alongside client and in-house roles, I've built and shipped products with Magna Ventures, a small venture team taking ideas from concept to launch — experience that taught me to design with real constraints, speed and ownership.

I'm currently designing AIDA and open to new roles — midweight-to-lead, including founder / founding designer and fixed-term contracts.

How I use AI in Design

I design with AI to move faster — but the research, the craft and the decisions are mine.

AI helps me explore more directions, synthesise research and prototype in hours, not weeks. It's a tool in the process, not the designer.

I've gone further and augmented my practice with dedicated AI agents trained on my own knowledge, methods and taste — so they carry the repetitive work while I stay focused on the decisions that need me.

The judgement, the craft and the calls that actually matter stay human — which is exactly what high-stakes health and finance work demands.

A note on confidentiality

Out of respect for my collaborators and the organisations I have worked with, this project is not publicly documented.

Full case studies, process work, and outcomes are available on request and best walked through directly.

Get in touch

AI-Led Design Practice

Designing with AI — not just for it.

I operate at the intersection of product design and AI — building agent ecosystems, designing AI-native experiences, and bringing the same rigour I'd apply to a design system to the way I work with AI tools. Over a decade of product design experience, augmented by a curated set of AI agents trained around my methodology. The result: strategy, research, prototyping, and validation at the speed of a studio — with the critical human judgement that high-stakes experiences require.

01

AI-forward experience vision & strategy

I define AI product vision from first principles — connecting experience outcomes to business metrics, framing where automation earns trust and where human judgement must remain central. I've done this for AIDA (a two-sided medical-tourism AI platform, now rebranding to Nia), Agatha (citizen science health platform), and local multi-agent systems built on CrewAI.

02

Problem framing, experimentation & synthesis

I combine qualitative research, quantitative signals, and AI-driven synthesis to find the highest-value design opportunities. My agent ecosystem supports user research, competitive analysis, and journey mapping — surface insights faster, with less noise.

03

Foundational frameworks & AI design systems

I architect interaction patterns for rapidly evolving AI products — disclosure systems, confidence signalling, escalation UX, and the trust layers that make automation feel safe. Built across three regulated industries: healthcare, fintech, and marketplace.

04

Design quality, critique & cross-functional collaboration

I champion simplicity and trustworthiness in AI-enabled workflows — raising the design bar through hands-on critique and direct collaboration with engineers, data scientists, and compliance teams. I integrate sign-off into the sprint cycle, not at the end of it.

05

Innovation culture & rapid prototyping

I facilitate collaborative concept development and rapid prototyping — connecting vision to execution through clear communication and a bias toward shipping. I've built and scaled creative communities, led cross-functional teams across UX, engineering, and QA, and run sprint cycles that produce testable proofs-of-concept in days.

06

Responsible AI — automation, transparency & oversight

I design for the full complexity of AI-driven experiences: automation with appropriate human oversight, transparency without overwhelming disclosure, and augmentation that respects the stakes involved. In healthcare and patient contexts especially, these are not principles — they are constraints that shape every decision.

Selected AI Work

AIDA — two-sided AI platform for medical tourism (now Nia) Live
Agatha — open-source women's health investigation platform Ongoing

I'm open to midweight-to-lead product & brand design roles — including founder / founding designer and fixed-term contracts — with a soft spot for health-tech, fintech, SaaS and marketplaces.
